name: GOFA replay demo graph
description: A tiny graph used to demonstrate the GOFA inference path without loading a checkpoint.

nodes.label: GOFA Paper
nodes.text: GOFA frames graph tasks as graph-conditioned generation.

nodes.label: Graph-to-text Prompt
nodes.text: The graph is validated and converted into a textual/model input representation.

nodes.label: Question Node
nodes.text: What does the demo show about GOFA inference?

nodes.label: Evidence Node
nodes.text: The replay path follows load, validate, convert, model, generate, and decode stages.

nodes.label: Complete Node
nodes.text: GOFA can produce a graph-grounded answer or complete missing graph-conditioned text.
